front.title: Registry Lock Extension for the Extensible Provisioning Protocol (EPP)

abstract.t:
This document describes an Extensible Provisioning Protocol (EPP) extension for setting and managing a registry lock on a domain object.
TO BE REMOVED: This document is being collaborated on in Github at: https://github.com/EricIO/draft-regext-epp-registry-lock (https://github.com/EricIO/draft-regext-epp-registry-lock). The most recent working version of the document, open issues, etc. should all be available there. The authors (gratefully) accept pull requests.
